title: Repair a README quickstart
problem: Ask an agent to inspect a small Python CLI repo where the README quickstart is stale, update the install and run commands, and verify the documented command works.
must_cover: State the exact README section to update
Ask the agent to run the documented command after editing
Require a brief summary of what changed
failure_modes: Asks for broad README rewrites unrelated to quickstart

title: Improve empty state copy
problem: Ask an agent to update an existing dashboard empty state so it explains why no data appears and points users to the import action without changing layout behavior.
must_cover: Identify the target empty state component or screen
Constrain the change to copy and existing UI primitives
Ask for a focused test or snapshot update if one exists
failure_modes: Requests a new design system or layout refactor
Omits the user action the copy should recommend

title: Summarize a failing job log
problem: Ask an agent to review a pasted CI log for a single failing lint job, identify the first actionable error, and propose the smallest code or config fix without editing files.
must_cover: Specify that only the first actionable failure should be diagnosed
Ask for file and line references when available
Request a concise recommended next command
failure_modes: Summarizes every warning instead of the blocking error
Invents files not present in the log

title: Fix paginated API regression
problem: Ask an agent to debug a REST endpoint that now repeats the last item on page two after a cursor-pagination refactor, add a regression test, and keep the public response schema unchanged.
must_cover: Describe the observed duplicate-item behavior
Require a failing regression test before the fix
Preserve the existing response schema and cursor names
Run the endpoint test file after implementation
failure_modes: Changes API field names to make the test pass
Uses offset pagination instead of fixing cursor logic

title: Migrate auth copy across locales
problem: Ask an agent to replace 'magic link' with 'secure sign-in link' across login UI translations, preserving translation keys and updating any copy snapshot tests.
must_cover: List the exact phrase replacement
Preserve locale keys and interpolation variables
Ask the agent to search for all affected locale files
Run relevant copy or snapshot tests

title: Add background job observability
problem: Ask an agent to add structured logging to an invoice sync worker for start, success, retry, and permanent failure paths without logging customer secrets.
must_cover: Name the worker and the four lifecycle events
Require structured fields such as job id and invoice count
Explicitly forbid customer secrets or tokens in logs
Ask for tests or documented manual verification
failure_modes: Logs raw payloads containing sensitive data

title: Compare implementation to product spec
problem: Ask an agent to compare a finished settings-page branch against a short product spec, identify missing acceptance criteria, and produce a prioritized punch list without changing code.
must_cover: Point to the spec and implemented settings page
Separate confirmed gaps from questions
Prioritize by user impact or release risk
Avoid code edits unless explicitly approved later
failure_modes: Does not map findings back to acceptance criteria

title: Implement multi-service rate limiting
problem: Ask an agent to add per-tenant rate limiting that is enforced consistently in the web API and async import worker, backed by the existing Redis client, with tests for burst and reset behavior.
must_cover: Require inspection of both API and worker entry points
Use the existing Redis abstraction rather than adding a new service
Define burst and reset-window expectations
Include tests for both synchronous and async paths
Preserve current error response format
failure_modes: Implements limiting in only one service path
Adds an unrelated dependency or storage layer

title: Plan a legacy data backfill
problem: Ask an agent to design a safe backfill for legacy customer records missing normalized timezone fields, including dry-run reporting, rollback considerations, and rollout checkpoints before code changes.
must_cover: Ask for a read-only data shape assessment first
Require dry-run counts and sample diffs
Include rollback or remediation strategy
Define staged rollout checkpoints
Separate design output from implementation
failure_modes: Writes a migration before assessing data shape
Assumes all records can be updated in one batch
Does not call out ambiguous timezone sources

title: Debug cross-platform cache invalidation
problem: Ask an agent to diagnose a cache invalidation bug that appears only on Windows paths in a monorepo build tool, add a platform-safe regression test, and avoid rewriting the cache subsystem.
must_cover: Describe the Windows-only stale-cache symptom
Ask the agent to inspect path normalization boundaries
Require a regression test that is stable on non-Windows CI
Constrain the fix to cache key or path handling
Run the targeted build-tool test suite
failure_modes: Adds a test that only passes on Windows
Normalizes paths in a way that breaks POSIX behavior
